title: Code Factory: Proof-by-Sabotage Software Factory
description:
Code Factory is a local-first, open-source workflow for turning specifications, behavior checks, design-token contracts, policy verification, and release receipts into auditable software delivery. This source release includes its public documentation assets and Mermaid diagrams.

Evidence boundary: the project supplies deterministic tests, mutation challenges, workflow canaries, and signed or hash-linked receipts. It does not claim that a passing receipt replaces human review or proves an arbitrary production environment.

Dual licensed under MIT or Apache-2.0.
